# youtrack_group (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a YouTrack user group by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the YouTrack user group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Hub ID of the group.
